info.title: CoinMarketCap API
info.description: CoinMarketCap API provides cryptocurrency market data including listings, quotes, market pairs, OHLCV data, exchange data, and global metrics.

get.description: Returns a mapping of all cryptocurrencies to unique CoinMarketCap IDs.
Returns all static metadata for one or more cryptocurrencies.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of CoinMarketCap cryptocurrency IDs

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all active cryptocurrencies with latest market data.

parameters.description: Comma-separated fiat or cryptocurrency symbols to convert prices

parameters.description: Comma-separated CMC IDs to convert prices
